prompt: Convene the board — should we pivot from B2B to B2C for our SaaS product?

assertions.text: Output contains headers for all 3 agents
At least one explicit disagreement is surfaced between agents
Disagreement resolution follows COMPANY.md rules (domain owner priority or escalation to Gio)
Each agent turn is 60 words or fewer
Each agent includes a realistic risk or counterpoint from their domain
Agents engage with each other, not isolated monologues
